commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9e4e5a163ad00edf9c9c3e1681296be0749c7310)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds missing official external channel plugin repair hints to the shared channel summary builder and adds a unit test for that builder.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +54. Total +80 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: configure only `channels.feishu` with its owner plugin absent, and `getStatusSummary` can skip `buildChannelSummary` because no effective read-only channel is present.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer revision is needed because the code defect is narrow, but external real behavior proof must still come from a real setup before merge.

target.title: fix(status): surface missing external channel plugins in summary
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`status` summary generation could drop configured official external channels when
their plugin owner was missing, so summary-mode status had no repair hint even
though the config still declared the channel.

This patch teaches the shared channel summary builder to append the same
official external plugin repair guidance already used by richer status surfaces
when a configured channel id was not rendered by any loaded plugin.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/channel-summary.test.ts`
  - `Test Files  1 passed (1)`
  - `Tests  9 passed (9)`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/status.summary.test.ts`
  - `Test Files  1 passed (1)`
  - `Tests  18 passed (18)`

## Real behavior proof

- `Behavior addressed:`
  `status` summary no longer silently omits configured official external channels whose plugin owner is missing; it now emits the repair hint instead.
- `Real environment tested:`
  Local unit tests in this checkout.
- `Exact steps or command run after this patch:`
  `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/channel-summary.test.ts`
  `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/status.summary.test.ts`
- `Evidence after fix:`
  The new `buildChannelSummary` regression test expects:
  `Missing official external plugins:`
  `  - Feishu: Install the official external plugin with: openclaw plugins install @openclaw/feishu, or run: openclaw doctor --fix.`
- `Observed result after fix:`
  Both targeted test files passed.
- `What was not tested:`
  Full live CLI rendering of `openclaw status --json` against a real missing-plugin config.
target.author: hugenshen

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
